title: Brand Safety & Ad-Tech Routing Policy
description: Ruleset preventing brand drift and unsafe generation in user acquisition creatives.

max_warp_tolerance.description: Maximum allowable homographic warp for the brand logo.

banned_poses.description: List of prohibited ControlNet pose signatures (e.g., inappropriate gestures).

delta_e_max.description: Maximum CIE Delta E color difference allowed for primary brand colors.
